nodes.label: Operation Epic Fury
nodes.summary: Day 7 of military operations in Iran; Trump demands unconditional surrender within a 4-6 week campaign window.

props.content: Trump demanded Iran's unconditional surrender as strikes intensify; campaign expected to last 4-6 weeks.

nodes.label: Tehran School Strike
nodes.summary: Viral CCTV footage of a strike on a Tehran primary school fuels calls for an independent investigation.

props.content: CCTV video of Tehran primary school strike went viral; White House responded with 'American justice' video.

nodes.label: Mojtaba Khamenei Succession Pressure
nodes.summary: IRGC commanders are pressuring the Assembly of Experts to fast-track Mojtaba Khamenei's appointment.

props.content: IRGC pressuring Assembly of Experts via psychological pressure to skip protocols for Mojtaba Khamenei.

nodes.label: Ukraine-Russia Prisoner Swap
nodes.summary: Largest prisoner exchange since May 2025, involving 500-for-500 personnel mediated by US and UAE.

props.content: Two-day 500-for-500 prisoner swap completed; mediated by US and UAE.

nodes.label: UK China Spying Investigation
nodes.summary: UK police raided the home of a former Labour MP's husband as part of a counter-intelligence probe into China.

props.content: Police searched home of former Labour MP's husband in China spying investigation.

nodes.label: Apple Leadership Expansion
nodes.summary: Apple updated its leadership page to include Steve Lemay and Molly Anderson following seven product launches.

props.content: Steve Lemay and Molly Anderson added to Apple leadership page.

nodes.label: Kristi Noem Dismissal
nodes.summary: Trump fired DHS Secretary Kristi Noem over a disputed $200M advertising campaign.

props.decision_rationale: Trump claims he did not approve a $200M ad campaign mentioned in Noem's testimony.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Fall Prediction
nodes.summary: Market probability of Iran regime falling by June 30 rose to 35.1% following the surrender ultimatum.

props.content: Probability of Iran regime fall by June 30 is 35.1% (+1.1pp).

nodes.label: Tim Cook Succession Prediction
nodes.summary: Market probability of Tim Cook exiting in 2027 rose to 31.0%, though leadership updates suggest continuity.

props.content: Probability of Tim Cook out by 2027 is 31.0% (+2pp).
